Task_Description: Selected the New Zealand Electronic Card Transactions (ECT) dataset for business case analysis.
Created the Snowflake database (NZ_ECARDTR_DB) and the RAW schema.

Linked the GitHub repository to dbt Cloud and initialized the project structure.
Configured and saved the Development Environment in dbt Cloud.

Defined the Snowflake RAW table as a source in 'src_nz_ecardtr.yml'.
Created 'stg_transactions.sql' with column renaming and unit calculations.
Executed 'dbt run' and successfully built the staging model in Snowflake.
Verified the existence of the 'STG_TRANSACTIONS' view in the development schema.

Implemented complex DATE conversion logic for 'YYYY.MM' float format.

Committed and synced all Week 2 modeling progress to GitHub.
Resolved null values and implemented magnitude scaling logic.
Architected Star Schema with linked Fact and Dimension tables.
Resolved SQL ambiguity and filtered out 'Total' aggregate rows.

Validated NZ economic trends (Growth in Services vs. Decline in Durables).

Committed final "Gold Layer" models to main branch.

Source Accuracy Audit
